description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. A driveway leads to a covered garage area, with a car parked in front and a small patch of grass and two trees enhancing the curb appeal. The rear and side walls are mostly solid, with a few narrow vertical windows and a rooftop terrace visible from above. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light gray material, likely stucco or concrete, with clean lines and a lack of decorative ornamentation. The house is set within a small urban lot, bordered by a simple lawn and paved surfaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist gray exterior. Features include a driveway, garage, rooftop terrace, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the driveway, parked car, two trees, and a partial view of the house's side wall with a vertical window.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large floor-to-ceiling windows on both stories, rooftop terrace, and open interior layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the garage entrance, car, and a single tree, as well as a mostly solid wall with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, garage door, driveway, and landscaped yard with a prominent tree.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, integrated garage, and no decorative overhang or porch
